description_long: This is a large, modern school complex surrounded by a green perimeter fence, featuring multiple single-story white buildings with flat roofs. The campus includes several outdoor facilities such as tennis courts, a basketball court, a sandpit, and green recreational areas. There are distinct zones for parking, sports, and play, as well as landscaped areas with trees and shrubs. The main building appears centrally located, with various wings extending outward, and several smaller auxiliary structures are distributed around the grounds. The layout is open and organized, with clear pathways and driveways connecting different sections. The overall design emphasizes functionality, accessibility, and outdoor activity spaces.
description: A modern, sprawling school campus with white flat-roofed buildings, sports courts, and landscaped green areas, all enclosed by a perimeter fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central building, and sports courts in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the parking area, auxiliary buildings, and sports facilities to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wings of the school, additional green spaces, and parking lots.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the tennis courts, sandpit, and the distribution of trees and smaller structures.
